summary: EarwigsContent component was added and EducationalContent.tsx was updated to include an 'earwigs' option in selectedPest and import EarwigsContent. SpidersContent.tsx was modified to add at least a clearly labeled Black Widow subsection and preserve the top-level Safety Warning alert. However, the required static earwig icon asset is not present in the diff summary, and the Earwigs selection button’s use of that icon cannot be confirmed from the truncated EducationalContent.tsx diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add a new static Earwig icon image asset under frontend/public/assets/generated (earwig-icon.dim_128x128.png) and use it in the Earwigs selection control via an tag with appropriate alt text.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff summary shows only one added file (EarwigsContent.tsx) and does not show the required PNG asset being added under frontend/public/assets/generated. Also, the truncated EducationalContent.tsx snippet does not include an Earwigs selection button using an tag with the earwig icon path and alt text.
evidence: File diff summary: Added files list contains only frontend/src/components/pests/EarwigsContent.tsx; no frontend/public/assets/generated/earwig-icon.dim_128x128.png is listed
